message:
fix(pool): harden restore_quarantined_primary against partial failures

Tighten the restore_quarantined_primary_with_sidecar_label function:

- Propagate quarantine_reconstructed_candidate errors instead of
  silently ignoring them (let _ = ... → .map_err()?). If the live
  candidate cannot be quarantined, the restore must fail closed to
  avoid overwriting it with a potentially stale artifact.
- Guard the primary rename with an exists check so sidecar-only
  restores (no quarantined primary) don't error on a missing source.
- Add 3 new tests:
  - restore fails closed when live candidate quarantine is blocked
    (read-only directory)
  - sidecar-only restore works when quarantined primary is absent
  - quarantine_corrupt_sidecars_or_restore_primary rolls back WAL
    quarantine when SHM quarantine fails

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
